deliverables.title: Create live WELTAY control board
deliverables.description: Set up the first GitHub Pages version of the WELTAY control board with a separate JSON backend data file.
deliverables.intendedOutput: Live control board link with backend data structure.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: GitHub Pages is live and the JSON backend file exists in the repository.

raaidd.title: Use GitHub Pages and JSON backend for control board
raaidd.description: The WELTAY control board will use GitHub Pages as the live front-end and a JSON file as the backend data source.
